Edit the file `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/cmk/vov_veiled/AXLA-Lexicon.adoc` to make the following changes. Read the file first, then apply all edits.

## 1. Rename broach→kindle in mapping section

Change line 114:
`:axvr_broach:                         <<axvr_broach,Broach Voicing>>`
to:
`:axvr_kindle:                         <<axvr_kindle,Kindle Voicing>>`

Change line 119:
`:axhro_broach:                        <<axhro_broach,Hierarchy Broach>>`
to:
`:axhro_kindle:                        <<axhro_kindle,Hierarchy Kindle>>`

## 2. Add cardinality dimension attribute refs

After the existing regime provenance dimension refs (after the `:axrd_file_sourced:` line), add:

```
:axrd_singleton:                     <<axrd_singleton,Singleton>>
:axrd_manifold:                      <<axrd_manifold,Manifold>>
```

Note: These should go after the `:axrd_file_sourced:` line (line 111) but before the blank line that separates sections. Match the column alignment of surrounding entries.

## 3. Add collection-level voicing operation attribute refs

After the `:axvr_validate:` line (line 116), add:

```
:axvr_list:                          <<axvr_list,List Voicing>>
:axvr_survey:                        <<axvr_survey,Survey Voicing>>
:axvr_audit:                         <<axvr_audit,Audit Voicing>>
```

## 4. Add collection-level hierarchy operation attribute refs

After the `:axhro_validate:` line (which after renaming is now `:axhro_kindle:` wait no — the hierarchy validate line stays. Let me clarify:

After the renamed `:axhro_kindle:` line and the existing `:axhro_render:` and `:axhro_validate:` lines, add:

```
:axhro_list:                         <<axhro_list,Hierarchy List>>
:axhro_survey:                       <<axhro_survey,Hierarchy Survey>>
:axhro_audit:                        <<axhro_audit,Hierarchy Audit>>
```

These go after `:axhro_validate:                      <<axhro_validate,Hierarchy Validate>>` (which is the last of the existing hierarchy operation markers in the mapping section).

## 5. Rename broach→kindle in definition sections

### Definition at axvr_broach (around line 2012-2018):
Change:
```
[[axvr_broach]]
{axvr_broach}::
Voices a regime broach operation definition.
The annotated term defines the silent initialization phase for a
{axrg_regime}:
setting defaults, detecting unexpected variables, and building derived structures.
```
to:
```
[[axvr_kindle]]
{axvr_kindle}::
Voices a regime kindle operation definition.
The annotated term defines the silent initialization phase for a
{axrg_regime}:
setting defaults, detecting unexpected variables, and building derived structures.
```

### Definition at axhro_broach (around line 2119-2126):
Change:
```
[[axhro_broach]]
{axhro_broach}::
Marks a regime broach operation description in a subdocument.
Lookahead: 1
{mcm_attribute_reference}
— the kit-level broach operation term (which must be voiced
{axvr_broach}
in the parent document).
```
to:
```
[[axhro_kindle]]
{axhro_kindle}::
Marks a regime kindle operation description in a subdocument.
Lookahead: 1
{mcm_attribute_reference}
— the kit-level kindle operation term (which must be voiced
{axvr_kindle}
in the parent document).
```

## 6. Update prose references to broach

### Line 1922 (Provenance dimensions section):
Change `{axvr_broach}` to `{axvr_kindle}`

### Line 1940:
Change "before broach." to "before kindle."

### Marker terms table entry (around line 2068):
Change:
`|{axhro_broach}     |1 {mcm_attribute_reference}  |Kit-level broach operation for this regime`
to:
`|{axhro_kindle}     |1 {mcm_attribute_reference}  |Kit-level kindle operation for this regime`

### Around line 2169 in the nesting rules:
Change `{axhro_broach},` to `{axhro_kindle},`

### The comment in the mapping section header (line 22):
Change `// axhr*_: Axial Hierarchy Regime (standalone hierarchy markers) → mcm_form_deflist`
— this line doesn't mention broach, so leave it alone.

### Check for any other "broach" references in the file and update them to "kindle" where they refer to this operation concept.

## 7. Add cardinality dimension definitions

In the "Regime Dimensions" section (after the `axd_conditional` definition which ends around line 1774), add:

```

[[axrd_singleton]]
{axrd_singleton}::
Regime has exactly one assignment source.
No enumeration or cross-instance operations apply.

[[axrd_manifold]]
{axrd_manifold}::
Regime has multiple assignment sources (one per instance).
Enumeration and cross-instance operations are meaningful.
```

## 8. Add collection-level voicing operation definitions

After the `axvr_render` definition (around line 2031), add:

```

[[axvr_list]]
{axvr_list}::
Voices a regime list operation definition.
The annotated term defines an enumeration operation for an
{axrd_manifold}
{axrg_regime}:
listing available instances.

[[axvr_survey]]
{axvr_survey}::
Voices a regime survey operation definition.
The annotated term defines a read-only cross-instance summary operation for an
{axrd_manifold}
{axrg_regime}.

[[axvr_audit]]
{axvr_audit}::
Voices a regime audit operation definition.
The annotated term defines a cross-instance validation plus external verification operation for an
{axrd_manifold}
{axrg_regime}.
```

## 9. Add collection-level hierarchy operation marker definitions

After the `axhro_kindle` definition (the renamed one, previously axhro_broach), or more precisely after the `axhro_render` definition (around line 2143), add:

```

[[axhro_list]]
{axhro_list}::
Marks a regime list operation description in a subdocument.
Lookahead: 1
{mcm_attribute_reference}
— the kit-level list operation term (which must be voiced
{axvr_list}
in the parent document).
Only valid on
{axrd_manifold}
regimes.

[[axhro_survey]]
{axhro_survey}::
Marks a regime survey operation description in a subdocument.
Lookahead: 1
{mcm_attribute_reference}
— the kit-level survey operation term (which must be voiced
{axvr_survey}
in the parent document).
Only valid on
{axrd_manifold}
regimes.

[[axhro_audit]]
{axhro_audit}::
Marks a regime audit operation description in a subdocument.
Lookahead: 1
{mcm_attribute_reference}
— the kit-level audit operation term (which must be voiced
{axvr_audit}
in the parent document).
Only valid on
{axrd_manifold}
regimes.
```

## 10. Update marker terms table

In the marker terms table (around line 2060-2071), add three new rows after the `axhro_render` row:

```
|{axhro_list}       |1 {mcm_attribute_reference}  |Kit-level list operation for this regime
|{axhro_survey}     |1 {mcm_attribute_reference}  |Kit-level survey operation for this regime
|{axhro_audit}      |1 {mcm_attribute_reference}  |Kit-level audit operation for this regime
```

## 11. Update nesting rules

In the nesting rules section (around line 2169), where it says:
```
{axhro_kindle},
{axhro_validate},
and
{axhro_render}
```
Change to:
```
{axhro_kindle},
{axhro_validate},
{axhro_render},
{axhro_list},
{axhro_survey},
and
{axhro_audit}
```

Also update the text around line 2173 that says:
```
must appear within
{axhrb_regime}
scope but outside any
{axhrgb_group}
scope
```
This stays the same but should apply to the new markers too. Since it's already a general statement about the group, it should cover them. Just ensure the list of markers is complete.

## IMPORTANT NOTES:
- Preserve exact whitespace/alignment patterns from surrounding entries
- Do NOT change anything outside what's specified above
- Do NOT modify any file other than AXLA-Lexicon.adoc
- The file uses specific column alignment for attribute references in the mapping section — match the alignment of nearby entries
